text: Fibroblast to myofibroblast transition might represent an alternative way, besides EMT, to close wounds in the epithelial layer. Under the influence of inflammatory signals, fibroblast present in the mesenchymal tissue beneath the damage epithelium might be stimulated to differentiate into myofibroblasts. Especially in regions of the airways that became completely denuded from an epithelial layer this might form an alternative for EMT to repair the wound in the epithelium.
